II
II
Conectando personas, creando oportunidades

Quiénes somos.

NEXIA es una marca dedicada al acompañamiento, la interpretación y la asistencia personalizada para viajeros, profesionales y personas internacionales.

Inspirado en la palabra latina nexus — «conexión» o «vínculo» — NEXIA representa el puente que une personas, culturas, idiomas y oportunidades. Nuestra misión es facilitar cada experiencia, gestión o proyecto, ofreciendo un servicio cercano, profesional y de confianza.

Ya sea para viajes de negocios, turismo, trámites, reuniones o apoyo lingüístico, en NEXIA brindamos soluciones adaptadas a las necesidades de cada cliente, ayudándoles a desenvolverse con seguridad y tranquilidad en un entorno nuevo.

Creemos que una buena comunicación y un acompañamiento adecuado pueden transformar cualquier experiencia en una oportunidad de crecimiento y éxito.

nexus
Del latín — conexión, vínculo. El puente entre personas, culturas e idiomas.
III
III
A curated catalogue

What we do, together.

i.

Daily navigation

Errands, appointments, the pharmacy, the post office, the unfamiliar paperwork. I am beside you from morning espresso to the last evening stroll — handling what needs handling so the day belongs to you.

ii.

Cultural immersion

The neighbourhood markets locals visit, the family-run kitchens kept off the guidebooks, the quiet hour at a museum before the crowds. Real Spain, on its own terms.

iii.

Language fluency

Spanish · English · French · Arabic. Conversations, contracts, customs — never lost in translation.

iv.

Bespoke itineraries

Designed around your pace, your appetite, your interests. No tour-bus templates — every hour considered.

v.

Business support

Meetings, translations, introductions, market context. The cultural fluency that turns a trip into a deal.

vi.

Peace of mind

Discretion. Reliability. A familiar presence in an unfamiliar country. You arrive a visitor — you move like a local.

IV
IV
In their own words

Voices of those guided.

Not a guide — a quiet co-author of our days. Every hour felt arranged without ever feeling arranged. Spain was easier, deeper, warmer.
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Sarah Mitchell
Portland, USA · April
For my family, the language was a wall. He turned it into a doorway. Three generations, no friction — only Spain.
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Ahmed Hassan
Cairo, Egypt · June
Discretion you can feel. Knowledge worn lightly. The first day, I called him a concierge. By the last day, I called him a friend.
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Marie Leclerc
Paris, France · October
V
V
Three steps. No friction.

From a call to your first morning.

01

A conversation

Call or write. Tell me your dates, your hopes, the shape of the days you want. There is no form — only an exchange.

02

A quiet plan

Within hours I send a discreet outline — places, hours, contingencies. We refine it until it reads like your own diary.

03

Your Spain

I am beside you from the moment you arrive. You decide the pace. I dissolve the rest.

VI
VI
In case you wondered

Considered questions.

Spanish, English, French and Arabic — fluently. Whichever feels most like home to you, that is the one we use.

A single phone call to +34 627 942 261, or the short form below. Within a few hours you will have an answer and a plan.

All of Spain — Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla, the Costas, the inland villages most never reach. Wherever the country calls you.

No. Many clients are here for business, for medical visits, for family matters, for the slow projects of relocation. The service flexes to the reason.

Every month of the year. Each season here has its own grace — and its own rhythm of arrangements.

VII
An open line

Let us begin when you are ready.
